cards.title: Growth and Input Size
cards.governance_note: Define input dimensions and document time, space, I/O, communication, and human review costs.

cards.title: Thresholds and Bottlenecks
cards.governance_note: Estimate runtime, memory, latency, cost, and review thresholds with representative benchmarks.

cards.title: Degradation and Equity
cards.governance_note: Plan fallback behavior and audit who receives worse service or less review under scale.
